name: Shepherd's Turkey Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, sauté the onions in the oil for 5 minutes.
2. Add the turkey (or chicken). Sprinkle in the flour and stir to blend it with the oil.
3. Add the chicken stock, carrots, tomatoes, thyme, and rosemary to the pan.
4. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens.
5. Pour into a lightly oiled 3-quart casserole dish.
6. Spread the mashed potatoes evenly over the top of the filling.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 20 to 30 minutes, or until the pie is browned and set.
(Original nutritional information and source details are omitted as per instructions.)
